generated_by: Claude - split from combined written_content_index.json into WA-series-only manifest. Companion file: notes_content_index.json covers Simon Sir Notes, Current Topics, and Engineering Management Notes.
scope: Written Question Answers (WA) series ONLY - long-form written-exam model-answer chapters at /meoclass1/written/. Not the oral notes series (see notes_content_index.json).
series_naming_convention: WA<series_number>-<topic_code><chapter_number>.html — e.g. WA1-HKC1.html, WA1-HKC2.html, WA2-GHG1.html. New chapters under an existing topic code are appended with the next available chapter number within that WA series. New topic areas get the next unused series_number.
source_of_truth_policy: This JSON is the authoritative source. index.html cards are generated FROM this manifest, not edited independently. Any content change updates this file first.

WA2-GHG1.html.status: review copy - ungated, pending gate + publish
WA2-GHG1.html.regulatory_sensitivity: low - covers short-term measures (EEXI/CII/SEEMP) already in force; stable regulatory ground
WA2-GHG1.html.regulatory_status_note: Includes correct current status note that mid-term Chapter 5 measures are approved (MEPC 83) but not yet adopted.

WA2-GHG2.html.title: MARPOL Annex VI Chapter 5 — The IMO Net-Zero Framework
WA2-GHG2.html.status: review copy - ungated, pending gate + publish
WA2-GHG2.html.regulatory_sensitivity: HIGH - Chapter 5 adoption status is actively moving. Re-verify before every reuse/reference after MEPC ES.2 reconvenes (scheduled Nov 2026) — status may change from 'approved, pending adoption' to 'adopted' or 'in force'.
WA2-GHG2.html.regulatory_status_note: Chapter 5 approved at MEPC 83 (Apr 2025), adoption session MEPC ES.2 (Oct 2025) adjourned without agreement, reconvenes Nov 2026. Framed as 'approved, pending adoption' throughout, not 'in force'. Expanded evaluative Part 4 (industry impact) added per Nixon's request.
